basic_details.job_title: NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Goa has released the official Faculty Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of First Class M.Tech. / Ph.D. (submitted/awarded) in Civil Engineering can apply online on or before 09 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.details: Faculty (Civil Engineering): First class M.Tech. / Ph.D. (submitted/awarded) in Civil Engineering

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 50,000/- per month with Master's degree and Rs. 70,000/- per month with a Ph.D. Degree
salary_details.details: Faculty (Civil Engineering): Rs. 50,000/- per month with Master's degree Faculty (Civil Engineering): Rs. 70,000/- per month with a Ph.D. Degree

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Interview (Offline mode only)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Goa to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the NIT Goa Faculty positions is 09 June 2026. Ensure all your documents and the application form are submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Faculty posts at NIT Goa?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Faculty (Civil Engineering) position at the Indian Institute of Technology Goa as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Faculty position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First class M.Tech. or Ph.D. (submitted/awarded) in Civil Engineering to be eligible for the Faculty positions at NIT Goa.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 50,000/- per month for candidates with a Master's degree and Rs. 70,000/- per month for those with a Ph.D. degree.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out the Google form provided.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the NIT Goa Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for these Faculty positions. Candidates can proceed with their application without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Faculty roles?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the scrutiny of applications received, followed by an interview. The interview will be conducted in offline mode only.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Goa apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Goa. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific residency requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to compile the filled application form along with scanned copies of original documents and published papers (if any) into a single PDF file for submission.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please refer to that section for direct access.
